title: bassovia micrantha
intro: Bassovia micrantha is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and it is also known as the "calabar bean". It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a strong emetic and having anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Bassovia micrantha include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat conditions such as fever and rheumatism. Bassovia micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although caution should be exercised due to its powerful and potentially toxic properties.
